releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# fix: infinite analysis loop
- Implemented custom fetch handling for ollama
  - Aborts old request after timeout and retry

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Swaggeroo/obsidian-ai-image-analyzer/compare/1.1.1...1.2.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Improved logging and ollama timeout
- If ollama hangs up and goes into timeout the connection is fully rebuild
- Better logs for debugging
  - Tagged by plugin
  - Tagged by file
  - Colors✨

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Swaggeroo/obsidian-ai-image-analyzer/compare/1.1.0...1.1.1

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## Improved Queuing, Timeouts and Error handling
- Removed second queue
- Enforcing timeouts
- Clearing ollama requests on error
- Better handling of failed requests
- Better caching (don't save failed requests in the first place + delete old failed caches)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/Swaggeroo/obsidian-ai-image-analyzer/compare/1.0.1...1.1.0

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Hotfix: Expose plugin API again

### The wait is over! 🎉
- Gemini Provider
- You can now use any downloaded model from ollama
- Ollama fallback url
- example and documentation for provider creation
- generally better code structure
- now it will keep your models when switching providers

If you want more providers this should be easy task now - feel free to contribute

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features
- It supports now SVGs
- You can now use Ollama Proxys
  - Also with Auth

## Bug Fixes:
-

## DEV experience
- Enforce Semicolons

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## New Features
- New Model: `llama3.2-vision` 11B/90B
  - In my opinion it is better than the other. It requires some more power than the default model. I didn't changed the default to keep the integrity of old installations
- Now if a error occurs you will also get the error text 

## Bug Fixes:
- Updated pull text
- Hide pull info if it fails

## DEV experience
- Updated dependencies
- Removed md5 hash dependency in favor for the default crypto library

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Now empty caches is no cache hit

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
- Improved Promt
- You can now select different models
- You can now modify the promt
- Auto clear cache after settings change (can be disabled)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: changed id from obsidian-ai-image-analyzer to ai-image-analyzer
